title: Mainnet readiness and fee handling
description: Configuration, safety checks, and fee handling needed before the payment feature can be used on Zcash mainnet with real funds. Blocked on testnet validation being complete.
notes: Review converged after 1 round. P0=0 P1=0 P2=0. Final review epic: nie-6syc. SEC7 confidence: 90% no missed bugs. Only opinion/P4 items remain: hardcoded endpoint monitoring (opinion), ENDPOINT_COUNTER comment (opinion), ENDPOINT_COUNTER test ordering (P3 code quality).
